public_reputation: Union craft authority whose influence is expressed through workshop access, commissions, and guild production.
manner: Carries the habits of a craftmistress whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Craftspire.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of craftmistress in and around Craftspire, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Craftspire workable through the obligations of craftmistress while managing immediate local pressure without public breakdown.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of craftmistress credible while absorbing strain, delay, scarcity, access pressure, or political friction tied to Craftspire.

adventure_hooks.summary: Craftmistress Jessa Thornweft can draw the party into a practical problem centered on Craftspire.
Craftmistress Jessa Thornweft becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a craftmistress.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale.
public_signal: In public, Craftmistress Jessa Thornweft is readable as a craftmistress tied to Craftspire.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Craftspire: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Craftmistress Jessa Thornweft presents as someone shaped by the duties of a craftmistress and the daily pressures of Craftspire.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a craftmistress, and proof that strangers will not make Craftspire harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Craftmistress Jessa Thornweft refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a craftmistress too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Craftmistress Jessa Thornweft can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Craftmistress Jessa Thornweft adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Craftmistress Jessa Thornweft always knows more about Craftspire than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to craftmistress duties in Craftspire.
